candidate_projection.mapping_rule: Each BA promotion candidate maps to exactly one card_print_identity row in domain pokemon_ba:v1 before canon promotion.

why_no_ad_hoc_card_prints_columns: The BA 4D identity law is represented directly on card_print_identity explicit fields.
Uniqueness lives on identity_domain + identity_key_version + identity_key_hash instead of widening card_prints.
card_prints remains the durable canonical object and does not need BA-only discriminator columns.
ba_unblock_statement: BA promotion may proceed only after card_print_identity exists, BA sets are registered, BA identity rows can be represented losslessly, and all Phase 6 unblock conditions remain satisfied.
